pkgmetadata.longdescription: At the moment, this module only provides minimal functionality, just enough to support the "distributed-process-azure" package (Azure backend for Cloud Haskell). However, the code is set up in such a way that adding additional functionality should be relatively straightforward; developers who wish to do will probably want to consult the Windows Azure Service Management REST API Reference (<http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windowsazure/ee460799.aspx>).
